pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which creates and configures this directory for the agent.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which sets this up for simulation outputs.
Verified via standard conversion: 50 km/h / 3.6 = 13.888... m/s. Code inspection of the network file shows all 111 relevant edges fall under this threshold.
Verified via standard conversion: 30 km/h / 3.6 = 8.333... m/s, aligning perfectly with the 'Zona 30' task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio dataset. The target working directory for the new scenario is /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30, and outputs are placed in /home/ga/SUMO_Output. The speed threshold of 13.89 m/s correctly translates to 50 km/h, and the target 'Zona 30' speed of 8.33 m/s translates to 30 km/h.
